items.title: 'Unprecedented' fire at Australian oil refinery to impact nation's petrol supplies
items.summary: The fire has deepened fears over the nation's petrol supplies amid a global crunch.

items.title: Shakespeare Bought One Property in London. Now We Know Exactly Where.
items.summary: In confirming the precise location of William Shakespeare’s Blackfriars house, a British scholar raises fresh questions about what he intended to do with it.
